name: Official Sources
author: Various Sources
description: The core dictionary and sentence data for the application.

source_names.ced: Dr Durbin Feeling Cherokee English Dictionary 1975
source_names.cnmed: Medical terms provided by Cherokee Nation (western dialect)
source_names.ncmed: Medical terms in Giduwa (North Carolina/eastern dialect), based on class notes provided by Bo Taylor of the Eastern Band.
source_names.banks: Banks, William H. Jr. (1953), "Ethnobotany of the Cherokee Indians." Master's Thesis, University of Tennessee
source_names.hsbc: Holmes, R. B., & Smith, B. S. (1997). Beginning Cherokee. Norman: University of Oklahoma Press.
source_names.sskil: The Shadow of Sequoyah: Social Documents of the Cherokees, 1862-1964
source_names.magok: Montgomery-Anderson, B. (2008). A reference grammar of Oklahoma Cherokee.
source_names.vrb: Kirk, W. (2012). Verb Reference Book Didehloqwasgi. Northeastern State University
